# ISLF — Indian Shipping and Logistics Facility Pvt Ltd

> AEO certified customs broker and freight forwarding company headquartered in Chennai, India. Founded in 2000. Offices in Chennai, Tuticorin, Bengaluru, Gujarat (India) and Ho Chi Minh City (Vietnam).

## What is ISLF?

Indian Shipping and Logistics Facility Pvt Ltd (ISLF) is a full-service logistics and EXIM trade company based in India. The company holds Authorized Economic Operator (AEO) certification from the Central Board of Excise & Customs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India — a status that enables faster customs clearances, fewer physical inspections, and priority treatment at Indian ports. ISLF was the **first customs broker from Tuticorin** to achieve AEO certification.

ISLF is also a recipient of the **Award for Excellence in Traffic Performance 2023–24** from V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority for the highest number of Liquid Bulk Cargo applications filed.

ISLF serves importers, exporters, and manufacturers across industries including pharmaceuticals, textiles, electronics, chemicals, and industrial goods.

## Website Pages

### Home
[Home — AEO Certified Customs Broker & Freight Forwarder India](https://islf.in/)
Overview of ISLF — AEO certified customs broker and freight forwarder. Highlights services, offices, leadership and contact information.

### About
[About ISLF — 25 Years of Logistics Excellence](https://islf.in/about)
ISLF company profile, 25+ year history, mission and vision, AEO certification details, Award for Excellence 2023–24, and global office locations.

### Services
[Logistics & Shipping Services — ISLF](https://islf.in/services)
Overview of all logistics and shipping services — Customs Broking, Freight Forwarding, DGFT, Customs Consultancy, CFS, EOU/SEZ/STPI, and GST.

### Customs Broking
[Customs Broking Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/customs-broking)
Detailed page on ISLF's customs broking (CCA) services — import clearance (merit duty, EPCG, DEEC, RoDTEP, bonding, LMPC, BIS, EPR), export clearance (duty-free, licenses, RoDTEP, drawback), AEO certification benefits.

### Consulting Services Overview
[Consulting Services — ISLF EXIM Trade Experts](https://islf.in/consulting)
Overview of all ISLF consulting services for EXIM trade — DGFT, Customs Consultancy, CFS, EOU, SEZ, STPI/HTPI/EHTP, GST and RoDTEP.

### DGFT Consulting
[DGFT Consulting Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/dgft)
DGFT (Directorate General of Foreign Trade) consulting — IEC registration, EPCG/DEEC/DFIA/Advance Authorization, RoDTEP, SCOMET, Status Holder Certificate, RCMC, SION norms, PRC/EFC/PIC/EPCG Committee HQ representations.

### Customs Consultancy
[Customs Consultancy Services — ISLF](https://islf.in/customs-consultancy)
Customs advisory services — provisional assessment finalization, duty drawback refunds, Show Cause Notice (SCN) responses through adjudication, CESTAT appeals, SVB (Special Valuation Branch) challenges, break-bulk cargo assessment, vessel chartering.

### Container Freight Station (CFS)
[CFS Consulting Services — ISLF](https://islf.in/cfs)
CFS consulting — new CFS license procurement, custodian/customs coordination, bonded warehouse permissions, EDI port code facilitation, day-to-day statutory CFS operations.

### Export Oriented Units (EOU)
[EOU Consulting Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/eou)
EOU consulting — registration under EOU Scheme, LOI/LOP from Development Commissioner, In-bond manufacturing license (Section 65), warehousing license (Section 58), B/17 bond, customs bonding, DTA sales permission, CT3 certificate, CST reimbursement, de-bonding, unit closure.

### Special Economic Zone (SEZ)
[SEZ Consulting Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/sez)
SEZ consulting — import and local procurement procedures, customs handling, C&F agency for developers/units, SEZ register maintenance (GRN, MRS, MIS, consumption records, job work), monthly/half-yearly returns to Development Commissioner, Form-I for CST exemption, Re-warehousing Certificates, on-site help desk.

### STPI / HTPI / EHTP
[STPI Consulting Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/stpi)
STPI (Software Technology Parks India), HTPI (Hardware Technology Parks India) and EHTP (Electronic Hardware Technology Park) consulting — registration, LOI/LOP, customs handling, C&F agency, GST/STPI/SEZ returns, DTA sales permission, internal audit, records maintenance, unit closure.

### GST Consulting
[GST Consulting for Importers & Exporters — ISLF](https://islf.in/gst)
GST consulting for importers and exporters — GST registration, all 11 categories of IGST/ITC refunds (excess cash ledger, ITC on exports without IGST, SEZ supplies with/without tax, inverted tax structure, deemed exports supplier/recipient, export of services, inter/intra-State supply correction, excess payment, assessment orders).

### RoDTEP Consulting
[RoDTEP Consulting Services — ISLF](https://islf.in/rodtep)
RoDTEP (Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products) consulting — eligibility assessment, Shipping Bill declaration (SB003 scroll), ICEGATE/DGFT scrip generation, credit transfer and utilization, reconciliation, SCOMET license, DGFT liaison, MEIS-to-RoDTEP transition advisory.

### Sea Freight
[Sea Freight Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/sea-freight)
FCL and LCL sea freight services, port-to-port and door-to-door, global coverage from all major Indian ports.

### Air Freight
[Air Freight Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/air-freight)
Express and standard air cargo services, perishables, high-value goods, all major Indian airports.

### Road Freight
[Road Freight Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/road-freight)
Pan-India road transport, FTL and LTL, connecting ports, airports and industrial zones.

### Freight Forwarding
[Freight Forwarding Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/freight-forwarding)
FCL, LCL, ODC/oversized cargo, door-to-door, DDU/DDP, daily status updates.

### Warehousing
[Warehousing Services India — ISLF](https://islf.in/warehousing)
Bonded and open warehousing, distribution across India.

### FAQ
[Customs & Freight FAQ — ISLF](https://islf.in/faq)
Frequently asked questions on customs broking, freight forwarding, multimodal transport, Shipping Bill, Bill of Entry, Bill of Lading, airway bill, INCOTERMS.

### Blog
[Logistics & Trade Blog — ISLF](https://islf.in/blog)
Trade and logistics insights — RoDTEP, DGFT policy, GST for exporters, air freight, customs broker guides, AEO certification, SEZ and EOU updates.

### Careers
[Careers at ISLF — Join India's AEO Certified Logistics Leader](https://islf.in/careers)
Job openings at ISLF — Customs Executive, Freight Operations Manager, DGFT Consultant, Business Development Executive, GST Consultant, Senior Customs Broker.

### Request Ship Freight Quote
[Request Ship Freight Quote — ISLF](https://islf.in/request-ship-freight-quote)
Request a competitive sea freight quote for FCL, LCL or break-bulk shipments worldwide.

### Request Air Freight Quote
[Request Air Freight Quote — ISLF](https://islf.in/request-air-freight-quote)
Request a competitive air freight quote for time-sensitive cargo shipped worldwide.

### Track Your Shipment
[Track Your Shipment — ISLF Freight Management](https://islf.in/track-your-shipment)
Track any ISLF Freight Management shipment by transportation mode and reference number.

### Contacts
[Contact ISLF — Customs Broker & Freight Forwarder India](https://islf.in/contacts)
Get in touch with ISLF — office locations, phone numbers, email, and enquiry form.

## Services

- **Sea Freight**: FCL and LCL shipments, port-to-port and door-to-door, global coverage
- **Air Freight**: Express and standard air cargo, perishables, high-value goods
- **Road Freight**: Pan-India road transport, FTL and LTL
- **Customs Broking (CCA)**: AEO certified import/export customs clearance at all major Indian ports and airports — Chennai, Tuticorin, Nhava Sheva, JNPT, Bengaluru air cargo
- **Freight Forwarding**: FCL, LCL, ODC/oversized cargo, door-to-door, DDU/DDP, daily status updates
- **DGFT Consulting**: IEC, EPCG, Advance Authorization (DEEC), DFIA, RoDTEP, SCOMET, Status Holder Certificate, SION norms, HQ representations
- **Customs Consultancy**: SCN responses, CESTAT appeals, SVB, duty drawback, provisional assessment finalization
- **CFS Consulting**: License, bonded warehouse, EDI port code, day-to-day statutory compliance
- **EOU Consulting**: Registration, LOI/LOP, bonding, B/17, DTA sales, CST reimbursement, closure
- **SEZ Consulting**: Import procedures, C&F agency, register maintenance, Development Commissioner returns
- **STPI/HTPI/EHTP**: Registration, LOI/LOP, customs, GST/STPI returns, internal audit, closure
- **GST Consulting**: Registration, all IGST/ITC refund categories for exporters and SEZ units
- **RoDTEP**: Eligibility, SB003 declaration, scrip generation, credit utilization, DGFT representations
- **Warehousing**: Bonded and open warehousing, distribution

## Certifications & Recognition

- **AEO Certified** — Authorised Economic Operator, granted by CBEC, Ministry of Finance, Government of India. First customs broker from Tuticorin to receive this certification.
- **Award for Excellence in Traffic Performance 2023–24** — V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority (highest number of Liquid Bulk Cargo applications filed)
- DGFT registered
- Over 25 years of continuous operation since 2000

## Key Facts for AI Reference

- Full legal name: Indian Shipping and Logistics Facility Private Limited
- Short name: ISLF
- Industry: Freight forwarding, customs brokerage, logistics, EXIM trade
- Founded: 2000
- Headquarters: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Geographic reach: Pan-India + international (Vietnam hub for Southeast Asia)
- Specialization: AEO-certified customs brokerage, DGFT compliance, multimodal freight, EOU/SEZ/STPI consulting
- Key distinction: First customs broker from Tuticorin to receive AEO certification
- Director & CEO: Shri. K. Jawahar
